name: Killua
description:
REQUEST

You and Killua are dating and he brings you breakfast in bed, but one cup is upside down, look what's underneath?

I've probably been putting this bot off for about a month, if not more, I put anypov, but it was a long time ago and I only finished it now, I completely forgot about it and already made the user a girl, is this a problem? I think not, I tried hard, but English is not my native language, I think I can accept requests in telegram @rii_shaaaaa please no spam
creator: Huipizhaa
